text: When the tug is pulling the ship, the ship's crew should

options.text: Stand close to the bollard where the rope is secured
Keep well clear of the tug’s rope
Keep slacking the rope as the weight comes on it
Tie a rope stopper to the tugs rope

explanation: When a tug is pulling a ship, there is significant tension on the lines. Crew members should maintain a safe distance from the towline and any associated equipment to avoid injury from potential snap-backs.
